one_time_description: Impairment loss recognized on investment in Seakist Lobster Limited due to sustained losses since acquisition
economic_notes: Business enterprises include Landing #2 (convenience store), Glooscap Energy (renewable energy), Seakist Lobster (lobster pound), Yarmouth Bar Fisheries (seafood processor, 52% owned). Prior period restatement for Yarmouth Bar of $174,199 corrected through current year. Impairment of $385,157 on Seakist Lobster investment.
notes: Complex consolidation: 3 fully consolidated subsidiaries (Glooscap Ilia Gourmet Foods LP ceased 2020, Landing #1 LP, Glooscap Economic Development Corporation) and 4 GBEs on modified equity basis (Landing #2, Glooscap Energy, Seakist Lobster, Yarmouth Bar). Prior period restatement of $174,199 for Yarmouth Bar corrected in current year. Impairment loss of $385,157 on Seakist Lobster. Deferred revenue increased significantly to $4,308,968 from $15,725. Current liabilities calculated as accounts payable $877,912 + grant payable $794,046. Restricted cash includes $4,308,968 deferred revenue funds and $1,036,688 FNFA debt reserve fund. OSR estimated by subtracting identified government transfers from total revenue.
